title: Add AutoML for hyperparameter tuning
original_text: Implemented AutoML for automatic hyperparameter tuning. Integrated Optuna for hyperparameter optimization. Implemented automated feature selection. Added neural architecture search for deep learning. Implemented automated model selection. Added hyperparameter search space definition. Added experiment tracking with MLflow. Result: AutoML pipeline operational.
expected_subject: feat(ml): add AutoML for hyperparameter tuning
expected_body_lines: - Add neural architecture search for deep learning
expected_command: git commit -m "feat(ml): add AutoML for hyperparameter tuning"
